hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$logDir = 'C:\Users\gavin\Documents\Claude\Health-Logs'; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $logDir 'latest.txt')) { $lastScan = (Get-Item (Join-Path $logDir 'latest.txt')).LastWriteTime; $daysSince = ((Get-Date) - $lastScan).Days; if ($daysSince -ge 7) { Write-Output \"NOTICE: Last health scan was $daysSince days ago. Consider running /windows-it-tech:windows-health-scan\" } } else { Write-Output 'NOTICE: No health scan logs found. Consider running /windows-it-tech:windows-health-scan' }"
